column1: # Blast-radius manifest — routes an upstream src/ change to the Zig file(s) that must
# absorb it, plus a risk tier. Used by upstream_router.py to classify each upstream commit mechanically.
# Format:  <src-glob>\t<zig-owner(s)>\t<risk>     risk ∈ {SKIP,LOW,MED,HIGH}.  First matching rule wins,
# so order most-specific first. fnmatch globs (use * ). Owner cells are FULL repo paths — a relative
# cell is invisible to upstream_map_derive.py --audit, which is what keeps this file honest.
# Tightened 2026-07-23 against the comment-derived map (upstream_map_derive.py): the campaign splits
# had grown most blast radii — search.cpp alone from 2 owners to 13.
# --- platform / build / CI: not needed for the x86-64-sse41-popcnt native target -> SKIP ---

column2: (net embedding — SKIP, we load net at runtime)
(fat-binary entry shims + net embed — SKIP, one binary per arch, runtime net)
